case_title: JURADO-BLANCO, JOAN VS GAOS, MARIANO DBA SEES INTERPRETERS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JURADO-BLANCO, JOAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GAOS, MARIANO DBA SEES INTERPRETERS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
